title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Imperial Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Imperial Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
